title: STAR WARS™ - Knights of the Old Republic™

notes: Works fine. FullScreen=0, AllowWindowedMode=1 AND disable Steam Overlay to avoid CTD after character creation.
title: STAR WARS™ - Knights of the Old Republic™

notes: Does it work? Yes. Crashes maybe once during a 2 hour play session. Characters often get stuck and I am forced to use another character as the leader. Mouse is misaligned with the cursor, so you are often clicking on the wrong items. If you go fullscreen the problem is even worse. Fullscreen does not work with Anti-Aliasing on. You will have a cursor but just a black screen. I have tried the tweaks stated in the reviews.
title: STAR WARS™ - Knights of the Old Republic™

notes:
Despite what others have said about putting the game into window mode I've found a way to get it to get it to work in fullscreen but it requires changing your system resolution and you'll have to change it back every time you exit the game. Before doing the following make a note of what your resolution is (most likely 1920x1080) then add the following lines to the graphics options part of the swkotor.ini file. RefreshRate=60 Height=768 Width=1024 
Now run the command "xrandr --size 1024x768" and launch the game. It should launch fine to the menu. Unfortunately this is as far as I tested because I wanted to share my success of figuring this out ASAP but I'm 99% certain it should be smooth sailing from that point on. To get your resolution back. Run the same command but for your res so for example for me it's "xrandr --size 1920x1080" Also your probably thinking "Why don't I just change the steam launch settings for the game?" When I tried that it made the main menu appear the corner of the screen. I don't know why.
title: STAR WARS™ - Knights of the Old Republic™

notes: Plays as good as native when running in windowed mode. As someone posted below, edit swkotor.ini file in /home/username/.steam/steam/steamapps/common and change FullScreen=1 to FullScreen=0 -> then add a new line "AllowWindowedMode=1

title: STAR WARS™ - Knights of the Old Republic™

notes: It should be noted that KOTOR usually does not work out of the box even on modern Windows, it is not an issue exclusive to Proton. The same steps taken to get the game working properly at a modern resolution and fullscreen on WIndows (documented in this video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9SKMzwKE34E) work equally well on Proton. Some steps need to be adapted (You must rename swconfig.exe and unwis.exe to swkotor.exe and run through them Steam, or just run them normally through wine like I did). After that, the game runs and looks perfect.
title: STAR WARS™ - Knights of the Old Republic™

notes:
Here is my solution https://drive.google.com/file/d/1jA9UiSjuauB9_dRPzadepi482bS8apJq/view?usp=sharing

The archive contains the patched main executive file, the configuration file and a part of the adjusted interface for the image in FullHD. Simply replace these files in the game directory (for this, open the shortcut properties in the Steam Library and click on the button for viewing local files), and copy the contents of Override into the appropriate folder. Do not forget to disable Dx11 and Dx10 in the game launch options. Send me E-mail after your experiments - freedomsky09@gmail.com. With love from Russia, Freedom Sky.

title: STAR WARS™ - Knights of the Old Republic™

notes: Had to apply the usual swkotor.ini workarounds (disable fullscreen, enable windowed) and disable the Steam overlay to get it to a playable state.  Also had to enable v-sync to prevent a chronic issue where the player character would be unable to move via the keyboard after certain cutscenes or fights (though this reportedly affects Windows, too).  Still crashes to desktop every couple hours immediately after the loading screen between areas / after cutscenes, but thankfully my PC's beefy enough to get me back into the game reasonably quickly.
title: STAR WARS™ - Knights of the Old Republic™

notes: Install the Steam Proton version using Lutris as this will apply most of the fixes required to get the game working. The game should work without any fixes necessary, though I had to change the resolution to get the game to display correctly on my laptop.
title: STAR WARS™ - Knights of the Old Republic™

notes:
I only tried the usual swkotor.ini tweak, under Graphics options adding the line AllowWindowedMode=1 and setting FullScreen=0. Seems to work great! Haven't tried any Proton switches yet.

There is an odd "double start" thing going on. The game goes through the intro and sometimes (most of the time?) the main menu is unresponsive. A quick change of focus (click outside then inside the game window, or minimize/normalize it) fixes it, then it goes through the intro again (not from the start, but from Bioware logo), and then into the main menu again. Then it works.

There is also a snag at a resolution of 1280x1024, the hardware mouse pointer is off vertically by a bit. This seems to improve if using software mouse pointer (swkotor.ini). Other resolutions seems to work. I use 1280x960 atm.
